hook: Some days you just miss who you were before.
slide2: I was looking at old photos last night and I genuinely didn't recognise the version of me who laughed that easily. Not sure when I got so careful with everything. So tired of being careful.
slide3: I keep replaying that one message I never sent. Typed it out fully. Deleted it. Told myself it didn't matter. It did matter. I just didn't want to be the one who cared more.
slide4: Some nights healing doesn't feel like progress. It just feels like sitting alone with the same ache and choosing not to call someone who would only make it worse. That's still something, I think.
closer: What's one thing you stopped letting yourself feel lately?
caption:
some nights it's not sadness exactly. it's more like — missing a version of yourself you can't quite get back to.

not dramatic. just quiet and a little heavy.

if you're somewhere in the middle of figuring yourself out, this one's for you.

what feeling have you been pushing down the most lately?
